title: Apply safe work practices in the automotive manufacturing environment
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Apply safe work practices in the automotive manufacturing environment demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Identify work health and safety requirements

pcs.text: Identify Work health and safety (WHS) requirements applicable to the job context1.2 Identify roles and responsibilities of key personnel connected with WHS1.3 Identify and locate personal protective equipment (PPE) applicable to the job context
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify Work health and safety (WHS) requirements applicable to the job context1.2 Identify roles and responsibilities of key personnel connected with WHS1.3 Identify and locate personal protective equipment (PPE) applicable to the job context?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify Work health and safety (WHS) requirements applicable to the job context1.2 Identify roles and responsibilities of key personnel connected with WHS1.3 Identify and locate personal protective equipment (PPE) applicable to the job context.

elements.title: Follow work health and safety procedures

pcs.text: Carry out housekeeping according to workplace procedures and WHS requirements2.2 Identify and undertake appropriate manual-handling techniques and utilise safety equipment according to workplace and manufacturer procedures and WHS requirements2.3 Utilise personal protective equipment (PPE) according to workplace and manufacturer procedures and WHS requirements2.4 Maintain and store PPE according to workplace and manufacturer procedures

elements.title: Respond to hazards and emergencies in the workplace

pcs.text: Identify and report workplace hazards and risks according to workplace procedures3.2 Identify non-conformance in the use, storage and labelling of hazardous materials and report to the appropriate personnel3.3 Identify and follow emergency procedures, reporting to appropriate personnel according to workplace procedures and WHS requirements3.4 Access and use emergency equipment according to manufacturer procedures and WHS requirements
